recommendations.title: Ithaca
recommendations.overview: In a small town in California's San Joaquin Valley, 14-year-old Homer Macauley is determined to be the best and fastest bicycle telegraph messenger anyone has ever seen. His older brother has gone to war, leaving Homer to look after his widowed mothe

recommendations.title: Nobody Else But You
recommendations.overview: The ambiguous suicide of a local beauty, weathergirl, cheese model, and Marilyn Monroe look-a-like finds an eager sleuth in David Rousseau, best-selling crime novelist. When Rousseau visits a remote Alps village for the reading of his friend's will h

recommendations.title: Les Cowboys
recommendations.overview: Drama about a father and son who set out to find their missing daughter/sister with the help of an American headhunter.

recommendations.title: A Woman Is a Woman
recommendations.overview: Longing for a baby, a stripper pursues another man in order to make her boyfriend jealous.

recommendations.title: Skirt Day
recommendations.overview: A teacher, driven to exasperation from insults and insubordination, takes her class hostage.

recommendations.title: Nuit d'ivresse
recommendations.overview: Jacques Belin, presenter of a silly TV show, gets drunk after receiving an award and misses the train bringing his TV-soap-star fiancée. He meets up with Frède, just out of prison after a three year sentence and, in between numerous arguments and Jac

recommendations.title: C'è tempo
recommendations.overview: After the death of his estranged father, professional rainbow-watcher Stefano finds out he has a 13-year-old half-brother, and that he must become his legal guardian to receive the inheritance.

recommendations.title: Mr. Morgan's Last Love
recommendations.overview: A widowed professor living in Paris develops a special relationship with a younger French woman.

recommendations.title: The Ideal Palace
recommendations.overview: Follows Joseph Ferdinand Chavel a French postman who built a palace in the French countryside over 33 years.

recommendations.title: Farewell, My Queen
recommendations.overview: A look at the relationship between Marie Antoinette and one of her readers during the final days of the French Revolution.
